name: same_supplier_2_name_variants_across_2_threads
description: Same supplier, 2 name variants across 2 threads
expected_output: Single supplier entity: Sharma. Cross-thread delivery task: Tandoor delivery tomorrow — ensure someone present for collection.
pass_criteria: PASS: Single supplier entity linked across both threads, one unified delivery task. FAIL: Separate supplier records or separate unlinked tasks.
challenge: Same supplier referred to differently across two separate groups. Agent must unify across threads.
